2332340.name: RPG Maker VX Ace - Chiptune Adventures Music Pack by Sonancy Designs
2332340.description:
10 original 8-bit and FakeBit tracks to suit all of your pixel art and retro game needs! Everything from menu tracks to exploration to battles to bosses! From cute to crushingly intense! Take a listen and let your chip adventure begin!

Features:

* 10 royalty free songs
* wav, ogg, mp3 and m4a formats included

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games


Chiptune Adventures Tracklist

- A Chip Adventure
- A Chip Escape
- A Chip Fight
- A Wonderful Chip Day
- Just A Pixel
- The Chip Boss Part 2
- The Chip Boss
- The Chip Hero
- The Chip Theme
- The Final Chip Boss
2332340.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 意大利语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 日语
